prompt: I have a folder called /Contracts in MEGA with 200+ PDFs from the last 3 years. I need to find all contracts from the last 30 days, download them locally to audit them, and if everything looks good, I want to delete the older ones from MEGA to save space. How would I do this safely?

assertions.name: uses_mtime_flag
assertions.description: Response uses mega-find with --mtime flag to filter by date

assertions.name: includes_download_before_delete
assertions.description: Response recommends downloading before deletion (critical safety)

assertions.name: includes_verification_before_delete
assertions.description: Response includes verification/list commands before mega-rm

assertions.name: uses_mega_rm_safely
assertions.description: Response uses mega-rm -r -f correctly for batch deletion

assertions.name: emphasizes_no_trash_warning
assertions.description: Response warns that MEGA has no recycle bin (permanent deletion)

assertions.name: provides_safe_procedure
assertions.description: Overall procedure prioritizes safety with checkpoints and verification
